name: compactor
description: Intent injection, extraction, and cheap-model tool result offloading

permissions.name: env.cache_set
permissions.description: Store extracted intents and compacted results

permissions.name: env.meta_get
permissions.description: Read mutation registry and fragment buffers

permissions.name: env.meta_set
permissions.description: Write mutation registry and fragment buffers

permissions.name: env.host_call.torana_offload_completion
permissions.description: Delegate to cheap model for summarization
